---
title: "VSCodeでSVGファイルを編集可能にする"
author: "Ryo Nakagami"
date: "2026-05-03"
date-modified: "2026-05-03"
categories: [環境構築, vscode]
listing_category: development
comments:
  utterances:
       repo: RyoNakagami/regmonkey-datascience-blog
       label: discussion
       issue-term: title
---

## SVGをVSCode上で編集可能にする手順

1. Ioeb VSCode Setting UI
2. `editorAssociations` を検索
3. svgの項目を追加

| 項目 | 値 |
| ---- | ------- |
| `*.svg` | `default` |

[json経由で設定したい場合]{.mini-section}

```json
  "workbench.editorAssociations": {
    "*.svg": "default"
  },
```
